caption: A man wearing a black sweatshirt with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold lettering and a white baseball cap sits in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind him, a white wall features a logo with five gold stars and the words "UNICORN HUSTLE," along with a blue sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk in front of him is a black box and a white mug featuring the red and blue text "BOSS TALK ONE ON ONE". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains seated and facing toward the right, with slight shifts in his facial expression and posture as he speaks. The background, equipment, and branding remain static throughout the clip.
